China's Zheng Qinwen claimed the country's first-ever gold medal in Olympic singles tennis. Chinese amateurs and fans expressed excitement at the victory. They said the sport is growing in popularity across the country.

title: Fans hail China's first-ever Olympic gold in tennis singles - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: China's Zheng Qinwen claimed the country's first-ever gold medal in Olympic singles tennis. Chinese amateurs and fans expressed excitement at the victory. They said the sport is growing in popularity across the country.
